text:
There once was a clumsy squirrel. The squirrel loved nuts. One day, he climbed up a cherry blossom tree. He sat there munching on a bright orange blossom.

Suddenly, a gust blew him loose. He plummeted!

Oh dear!

But...

That blossom saved his life!

And now he climbs cherry trees all fall-down!
